ts.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 datetime with timezone offset

tool.description: The file-mutation tool that produced this change

file_path.description: Path of the edited/written file as the tool received it

work_item_id.description: Work item that owns this log entry; redundant with file location

edit-log-entry.description: One line of .ditto/local/work-items/<id>/evidence/edits.jsonl. Records Edit/Write/MultiEdit tool use so evidence collection is not command-only (V6); audit of what files a node touched.
